positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical arrangement of bioluminescent celestial flora and fauna. Central composition featuring giant, gracefully curling pitcher plants intertwined with glowing constellations and stylized crescent moons. The elements should be rendered in a clean, continuous-line tattoo art style mixed with elegant neo-geometric patterns. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep midnight blue, ethereal teal, shimmering gold foil accents, and deep violet. Strong emphasis on defined silhouettes, intricate negative space, and perfect symmetry. Isolated on a plain background suitable for apparel printing. Minimalist, perfect for a t-shirt graphic.
